TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 媽媽的煙斗_tutoh_na_yaya_mu
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 媽媽的煙斗 tutoh na yaya mu == mongna payas blyah yabay,媽媽的名字叫做yabay silan,小時候blyah yabay tutoh抽菸, tutoh的材料. 煙頭gamin ruma的部份可以用箭竹ginoq ruma,桂竹ruma abaw tbaku nquy tutoh,在煙頭gamin ruma nquy tutoh tutoh上的煙管(箭筍枝節nquy tutoh) blyah yabay nquy tutoh) ,blyah yabay tutoh,不知何時,媽媽已把blyah yabay揹了起來,而blyah yabay是聞到媽媽的菸草味abaw tbaku 才醒來,blyah yabay abaw tbaku 的味道, tutoh blyah yabay說: " gamin ruma tutoh . 而blyah yabay tutoh, gamin ruma blyah yabay blyah yabay說:" blyah yabay 在媽媽的數個煙斗tutoh blyah yabay tutoh,把煙 頭gamin ruma 和菸管(箭筍枝節nquy tutoh) nquy tutoh) sryanan放在菸管nquy tutoh上, sryanan可以穩定的貼在煙管nquy tutoh上而不會掉下來,這時 blyah nquy tutoh,聚精會神地要把珠子sryanan穩定的貼在煙管nquy tutoh 上, blyah yabay的腦海中,如果珠子sryanan nquy tutoh)上, (nquy tutoh) sryanan blyah yabay sryanan sryanan掉在菸管nquy tutoh phgup phgup, phgup phgup phgup帶回去. ,媽媽yabay silan yabay silan ,blyah yabay .現在blyah yabay blyah yabay yabay silan 與她的煙斗tutoh,媽媽blyah yabay .
S.PHON: == ***** tutoħ na jaja mu == moŋna pajas~ɕ βljaħ jaβaj,*******jaβaj s~ɕilan,***βljaħ jaβaj tutoħ**, tutoħ***. **ɣamin ruma********ɣinoq ruma,**ruma aβaw tβaku nquj tutoħ,***ɣamin ruma nquj tutoħ tutoħ****(****nquj tutoħ) βljaħ jaβaj nquj tutoħ) ,βljaħ jaβaj tutoħ,****,****βljaħ jaβaj****,*βljaħ jaβaj*********aβaw tβaku ***,βljaħ jaβaj aβaw tβaku ***, tutoħ βljaħ jaβaj*: " ɣamin ruma tutoħ . *βljaħ jaβaj tutoħ, ɣamin ruma βljaħ jaβaj βljaħ jaβaj*:" βljaħ jaβaj ********tutoħ βljaħ jaβaj tutoħ,** *ɣamin ruma ***(****nquj tutoħ) nquj tutoħ) s~ɕrjanan****nquj tutoħ*, s~ɕrjanan*********nquj tutoħ*******,** βljaħ nquj tutoħ,*********s~ɕrjanan*******nquj tutoħ *, βljaħ jaβaj****,****s~ɕrjanan nquj tutoħ)*, (nquj tutoħ) s~ɕrjanan βljaħ jaβaj s~ɕrjanan s~ɕrjanan****nquj tutoħ pħɣup pħɣup, pħɣup pħɣup pħɣup***. ,**jaβaj s~ɕilan jaβaj s~ɕilan ,βljaħ jaβaj .**βljaħ jaβaj βljaħ jaβaj jaβaj s~ɕilan *****tutoħ,**βljaħ jaβaj .
S.FORM: == 媽媽的煙斗 tutoh na yaya mu == mongna payas blyah yabay,媽媽的名字叫做yabay silan,小時候blyah yabay tutoh抽菸, tutoh的材料. 煙頭gamin ruma的部份可以用箭竹ginoq ruma,桂竹ruma abaw tbaku nquy tutoh,在煙頭gamin ruma nquy tutoh tutoh上的煙管(箭筍枝節nquy tutoh) blyah yabay nquy tutoh) ,blyah yabay tutoh,不知何時,媽媽已把blyah yabay揹了起來,而blyah yabay是聞到媽媽的菸草味abaw tbaku 才醒來,blyah yabay abaw tbaku 的味道, tutoh blyah yabay說: " gamin ruma tutoh . 而blyah yabay tutoh, gamin ruma blyah yabay blyah yabay說:" blyah yabay 在媽媽的數個煙斗tutoh blyah yabay tutoh,把煙 頭gamin ruma 和菸管(箭筍枝節nquy tutoh) nquy tutoh) sryanan放在菸管nquy tutoh上, sryanan可以穩定的貼在煙管nquy tutoh上而不會掉下來,這時 blyah nquy tutoh,聚精會神地要把珠子sryanan穩定的貼在煙管nquy tutoh 上, blyah yabay的腦海中,如果珠子sryanan nquy tutoh)上, (nquy tutoh) sryanan blyah yabay sryanan sryanan掉在菸管nquy tutoh phgup phgup, phgup phgup phgup帶回去. ,媽媽yabay silan yabay silan ,blyah yabay .現在blyah yabay blyah yabay yabay silan 與她的煙斗tutoh,媽媽blyah yabay .
S.PHON: == ***** tutoħ na jaja mu == moŋna pajas~ɕ βljaħ jaβaj,*******jaβaj s~ɕilan,***βljaħ jaβaj tutoħ**, tutoħ***. **ɣamin ruma********ɣinoq ruma,**ruma aβaw tβaku nquj tutoħ,***ɣamin ruma nquj tutoħ tutoħ****(****nquj tutoħ) βljaħ jaβaj nquj tutoħ) ,βljaħ jaβaj tutoħ,****,****βljaħ jaβaj****,*βljaħ jaβaj*********aβaw tβaku ***,βljaħ jaβaj aβaw tβaku ***, tutoħ βljaħ jaβaj*: " ɣamin ruma tutoħ . *βljaħ jaβaj tutoħ, ɣamin ruma βljaħ jaβaj βljaħ jaβaj*:" βljaħ jaβaj ********tutoħ βljaħ jaβaj tutoħ,** *ɣamin ruma ***(****nquj tutoħ) nquj tutoħ) s~ɕrjanan****nquj tutoħ*, s~ɕrjanan*********nquj tutoħ*******,** βljaħ nquj tutoħ,*********s~ɕrjanan*******nquj tutoħ *, βljaħ jaβaj****,****s~ɕrjanan nquj tutoħ)*, (nquj tutoħ) s~ɕrjanan βljaħ jaβaj s~ɕrjanan s~ɕrjanan****nquj tutoħ pħɣup pħɣup, pħɣup pħɣup pħɣup***. ,**jaβaj s~ɕilan jaβaj s~ɕilan ,βljaħ jaβaj .**βljaħ jaβaj βljaħ jaβaj jaβaj s~ɕilan *****tutoħ,**βljaħ jaβaj .
